lyric:
["E- del- weiss,
E- dev- weiss,
ev- ery
morn- ing you greet me,
Small and white,
clean and bright,
you look hap- ppy to meet me.
Blossom of snow may you bloom and grow,
bloom and grow for- ev- er.
E- del- weiss, E- del- weiss,
Bless my home- land for- ev- er!"]
lyric_text:
E- del- weiss,
E- dev- weiss,
ev- ery
morn- ing you greet me,
Small and white,
clean and bright,
you look hap- ppy to meet me.
Blossom of snow may you bloom and grow,
bloom and grow for- ev- er.
E- del- weiss, E- del- weiss,
Bless my home- land for- ev- er!
